scope: bounded RSI-like runtime adaptation for Humanoid Locomotion Runtime
status_note: Design evidence only. This file does not imply Gate SI promotion, controller modification, or runtime deployment.

candidates.title: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
candidates.relevance: episodic memory improves later decisions without weight updates
candidates.use_for_project: typed strategy memory and memory-content intervention design
candidates.avoid: free-text reflection directly driving runtime policy

candidates.title: Recursive Introspection: Teaching Language Model Agents How to Self-Improve
candidates.relevance: iterative error detection and correction across turns
candidates.use_for_project: conceptual reference for offline proposer and auditor loops
candidates.avoid: LLM in real-time robot safety loop

candidates.title: A Survey of Self-Evolving Agents: On Path to Artificial Super Intelligence
candidates.relevance: what/when/how taxonomy for self-evolving agents
candidates.use_for_project: classify evolution target as high-level strategy memory and selector config
candidates.avoid: ASI or strong RSI framing

candidates.title: Automated Design of Agentic Systems
candidates.relevance: meta agent search over agent designs
candidates.use_for_project: future offline candidate proposer/evaluator harness
candidates.avoid: autonomous code deployment to robot runtime

candidates.title: A Self-Referential Agent Framework for Recursively Self-Improvement
candidates.relevance: self-referential agent dynamically modifies its own logic
candidates.use_for_project: risk contrast and forbidden-claim boundary
candidates.avoid: claiming recursive successor design

candidates.title: Darwin Godel Machine: Open-Ended Evolution of Self-Improving Agents
candidates.relevance: code-modifying agents validated on coding benchmarks
candidates.use_for_project: archive, validation, rollback inspiration
candidates.avoid: self-modifying robot control code

candidates.title: AlphaEvolve: A coding agent for scientific and algorithmic discovery
candidates.relevance: LLM evolutionary improvement with evaluators
candidates.use_for_project: verifiable evaluator framing for candidate updates
candidates.avoid: algorithm evolution touching controller or safety path

candidates.title: ENPIRE: Agentic Robot Policy Self-Improvement in the Real World
candidates.relevance: agentic physical autoresearch harness with Environment, Policy Improvement, Rollout, and Evolution modules
candidates.use_for_project: primary template for Gate SI harness design: reset/verify, typed candidate improvement, validation rollout, offline evolution audit, and MRU/MTU-style utilization metrics

transfer_mapping.EN: EDP-backed reset and verification artifacts; runtime/evaluation split preserved
transfer_mapping.PI: CandidateUpdateProposer emits typed CandidateUpdateManifest for high-level recovery/config updates only
transfer_mapping.R: GateSIValidationRunner evaluates candidates on seed splits, matched seeds, and future snapshot branches
transfer_mapping.E: offline agent team analyzes logs/literature and proposes auditable manifest changes

candidates.avoid: modifying frozen humanoid locomotion controller in V0, autonomous code deployment, or claiming manipulation policy self-improvement as humanoid recovery evidence

candidates.title: RoboMemory: A Brain-inspired Multi-memory Agentic Framework for Lifelong Learning in Physical Embodied Systems
candidates.relevance: spatial, temporal, episodic, semantic memory for embodied agents
candidates.use_for_project: memory hierarchy reference
candidates.avoid: making full semantic 3D memory the V0 main claim

candidates.title: Self-Improving Robots: End-to-End Autonomous Visuomotor Reinforcement Learning
candidates.relevance: autonomous practice and robot policy improvement
candidates.use_for_project: near-neighbor robot self-improvement baseline
candidates.avoid: equating manipulation end-to-end visuomotor RL with high-level locomotion recovery

candidates.title: Real-world Humanoid Locomotion with Reinforcement Learning
candidates.relevance: causal transformer uses proprioceptive history for in-context adaptation
candidates.use_for_project: strong raw-history baseline and terminology guardrail
candidates.avoid: calling low-level history-conditioned control a strategy-memory SI loop

candidates.title: FRASA: An End-to-End Reinforcement Learning Agent for Fall Recovery and Stand Up of Humanoid Robots
candidates.relevance: humanoid recovery-specific DRL comparator
candidates.use_for_project: recovery metric and comparator discussion
candidates.avoid: replacing frozen gait/controller with low-level recovery policy in V0

candidates.title: Task-free Lifelong Robot Learning with Retrieval-based Weighted Local Adaptation
candidates.relevance: retrieval and local adaptation under task-free lifelong learning
candidates.use_for_project: memory retrieval and stale/shuffled memory ablation design
candidates.avoid: claiming manipulation lifelong learning results as humanoid locomotion evidence

candidates.title: Goedel Machines: Self-Referential Universal Problem Solvers Making Provably Optimal Self-Improvements
candidates.relevance: foundational strong RSI with proof-triggered self-rewrite
candidates.use_for_project: theoretical boundary and related-work contrast
candidates.avoid: proof-style self-modification or code rewrite claims

candidates.title: A Formulation of Recursive Self-Improvement and Its Possible Efficiency
candidates.relevance: formal RSI loop language
candidates.use_for_project: background terminology for bounded adaptation contrast
candidates.avoid: framing Gate SI as full RSI

candidates.title: Self-Taught Optimizer (STOP): Recursively Self-Improving Code Generation
candidates.relevance: fixed LM plus scaffold self-improvement
candidates.use_for_project: offline proposer architecture analogy
candidates.avoid: autonomous code deployment or sandbox bypass

candidates.title: ExpeL: LLM Agents Are Experiential Learners
candidates.relevance: experience gathering and knowledge extraction without parametric updates
candidates.use_for_project: post-episode memory consolidation analogy
candidates.avoid: natural-language lessons directly changing runtime actions

candidates.title: Agent-Pro: Learning to Evolve via Policy-Level Reflection and Optimization
candidates.relevance: policy-level reflection from trajectories
candidates.use_for_project: high-level policy update framing
candidates.avoid: transferring game-domain safety claims to robots

candidates.title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
candidates.relevance: skill library and environment feedback for embodied lifelong learning
candidates.use_for_project: strategy memory registry inspiration
candidates.avoid: executable Minecraft code skills as humanoid option contracts

candidates.title: Self-evolving Embodied AI
candidates.relevance: taxonomy for memory, task, environment, embodiment, and model evolution
candidates.use_for_project: classify V0 as memory plus high-level update only
candidates.avoid: embodiment or model self-evolution claims

candidates.title: Robo-Cortex: A Self-Evolving Embodied Agent via Dual-Grain Cognitive Memory and Autonomous Knowledge Induction
candidates.relevance: dual-grain memory and navigation heuristic induction
candidates.use_for_project: obstacle and navigation failure strategy memory reference
candidates.avoid: VLM imagine-then-verify replacing Gate SI

candidates.title: EmbodiSkill: Skill-Aware Reflection for Self-Evolving Embodied Agents
candidates.relevance: distinguishes skill content error from execution lapse
candidates.use_for_project: failure taxonomy and targeted high-level update design
candidates.avoid: direct skill-body rewrite outside V0 high-level recovery scope

candidates.title: RMA: Rapid Motor Adaptation for Legged Robots
candidates.relevance: body-state history and online adaptation for legged robots
candidates.use_for_project: strong baseline and body-memory metric reference
candidates.avoid: low-level motor adaptation in frozen-controller V0

candidates.title: Learning Getting-Up Policies for Real-World Humanoid Robots
candidates.relevance: G1 humanoid fall recovery and getting-up policy
candidates.use_for_project: recovery option and safety metric reference
candidates.avoid: low-level getting-up controller training as SI evidence

candidates.title: Self-Improving Embodied Foundation Models
candidates.relevance: success detector and autonomous practice for robot policy improvement
candidates.use_for_project: validation-loop and success-detector reference
candidates.avoid: end-to-end low-level policy improvement in V0

candidates.title: Safe Policy Improvement with Baseline Bootstrapping
candidates.relevance: conservative policy improvement with baseline fallback
candidates.use_for_project: Gate SI promote/reject and fallback logic inspiration
candidates.avoid: claiming theoretical safety guarantees for the humanoid stack
